entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the path was filled successfully; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Fills the specified path builder with the stroke outline of the source path.

params.dst: The path builder to receive the filled stroke outline.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the path was filled successfully; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Fills the specified path builder with the stroke outline of the source path after applying a transformation matrix.

params.matrix: The matrix to apply to the source path before computing the fill.
params.dst: The path builder to receive the filled stroke outline.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the path was filled successfully; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Fills the specified path builder with the stroke outline of the source path, clipped to the specified rectangle.

params.dst: The path builder to receive the filled stroke outline.
params.cullRect: The rectangle used to cull portions of the path outside the visible area.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, float resScale);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the path was filled successfully; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Fills the specified path builder with the stroke outline of the source path at the specified resolution scale.

params.dst: The path builder to receive the filled stroke outline.
params.resScale: The resolution scale factor used to determine how closely to approximate curves.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the path was filled successfully; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Fills the specified path builder with the stroke outline of the source path, clipped to the specified rectangle and transformed by the given matrix.

params.matrix: The matrix to apply to the source path before computing the fill.
params.dst: The path builder to receive the filled stroke outline.
params.cullRect: The rectangle used to cull portions of the path outside the visible area.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, float resScale);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the path was filled successfully; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Fills the specified path builder with the stroke outline of the source path, clipped to the specified rectangle and at the specified resolution scale.

params.dst: The path builder to receive the filled stroke outline.
params.resScale: The resolution scale factor used to determine how closely to approximate curves.
params.cullRect: The rectangle used to cull portions of the path outside the visible area.
